sidebar.subtitle: Frontend architecture, design systems and product focus.
sidebar.degreeCore: Core: Java, Python, JS, SQL, Android & Cloud Computing.

automind.h1: Drive the frontend of AUTOLOAD's modernization, migrating a legacy system to Next.js 14, React 18 and TypeScript, and contribute to the .NET 8 backend with SignalR and multi-tenant PostgreSQL.
automind.h2: Created and maintain @automind/react-components — design system with Radix UI, Storybook and Chromatic, consumed by the frontends across the AUTOLOAD ecosystem and by other company projects.
automind.h3: Built the frontend for AUTOMED (Angular), a measurement management system compliant with ABNT NBR ISO 10012.
automind.h4: Implemented Vitest + Playwright in the Azure DevOps pipeline — smoke tests on PR and full regression on release.
automind.h5: Write specs and requirements docs with stakeholders. Run code reviews and mentor junior devs.

branddi.h1: Architected an End-to-End infringement management solution — REST core (NestJS) with Pipefy integrations via GraphQL.
branddi.h2: Integrated Golang with RabbitMQ queues to process massive data through Web Crawlers and microservices.
branddi.h3: Set up the observability stack: centralized logging (Papertrail), Healthcheck alerts and Downtime monitoring.
branddi.h4: Managed AWS deployments and automated CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions.
branddi.h5: Led PR approvals and defined the team's unit testing strategy.

eisa.h1: Automated E2E tests with Selenium WebDriver, Cucumber and Ruby for VIVO systems — 90M+ users.
eisa.h2: Validated async flows in Apache Kafka and ran complex PL/SQL (Oracle) scripts on Linux.
eisa.h3: Led the migration from legacy repos (TortoiseSVN → GitLab).

parallel.h1: Built React (frontend) and Node.js (backend) features that improved the platform's sales conversion.
parallel.h2: Created auxiliary Python APIs and managed data persistence in MySQL.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.agentSkillsDesc: Modular skills for generative agents — each skill is self-contained with docs, rules and references.
skills.wigDesc: Personalized feed with geo + affinity scoring, Redis caching and cron-driven push notifications. Stripe subscriptions, Supabase Auth with RLS, rate limiting via proxy and standalone PWA.
skills.jacosegDesc: Conversion-focused landing page with responsive web design. Internal dashboard with Prisma + PostgreSQL multi-branch, NextAuth with RBAC, server actions with Zod validation and drag-and-drop tables.
skills.biancaDesc: Custom landing page with serif typography, Framer Motion animations and a layout designed to convey warmth. Firebase Auth, reCAPTCHA-protected form and email delivery via Nodemailer.
skills.portfolioDesc: SSG with ISR, Server Components with Suspense and resilient fetching (Promise.allSettled + timeout). Build-time PDF CV, open source via GitHub API, command palette (cmdk), theme toggle with View Transitions API and SoundCloud player via Widget API.

command.aiPrompt: Tell me about Luis Felipe Nascimento Gomes, Full Stack Developer from Salvador/BA, Brazil. Website: lfng.dev

metadata.title: Luis Felipe N. Gomes — Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Full Stack Developer · 5+ years · React, Node, TypeScript · MBA in Software Engineering (USP/Esalq) · Systems Analysis & Dev (Estácio, GPA 8.52/10) · Frontend architecture, design systems and product focus.
